title: Best of You
why_this_song: Best of You by Foo Fighters (2005) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 40 times; first heard in: "Is someone getting the best, the best, the best"
Appears 14 times; first heard in: "Is someone getting the best, the best, the best"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Is someone getting the best, the best, the best"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I was too weak to give in"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Has someone taken your faith?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "best" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "best" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I've got another confession to make

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Best of You" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Best of You"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Foo Fighters one question about "Best of You", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Foo Fighters sobre "Best of You", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Best of You" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Best of You" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
